title: Yandiel Muniz | Immigration Attorney | Colombo & Hurd
content:
## Immigration Attorney
Request A Consultation
Yandiel Muniz is an Immigration Attorney at Colombo & Hurd and a member of the Florida Bar Association. Mr. Muniz brings nearly eight years of experience in immigration law, with a practice focused on complex employment-based and family-based petitions for entrepreneurs, investors, athletes, and skilled professionals.
Before joining Colombo & Hurd, Mr. Muniz operated an independent immigration practice in Miami, where he managed cases spanning a wide range of petition categories. His practice included EB-1A, EB-2 National Interest Waiver (NIW), EB-5 investor, E-2 treaty investor, O-1A, and adjustment of status filings. He regularly collaborated with expert witnesses, business plan developers, and financial professionals to build compelling evidentiary records for high-level filings.
Prior to establishing his independent practice, Mr. Muniz served as an immigration attorney at a Miami-based firm, where he prepared and filed employment-based and family-based petitions, drafted responses to Requests for Evidence (RFEs), managed consular processing matters including DS-260 preparation, and represented clients at USCIS interviews.

## Knowledge & Experience
- J.D., Florida International University College of Law
- B.B.A. in Finance, Florida International University
Outside of his practice, Mr. Muniz is an avid world traveler, having visited more than 75 countries. He is an open water scuba diver and an avid chess player.
